summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open pull requests. No merge recommendation is safe because the artifact does not include a completed Codex /review merge preflight, and several PRs also have dirty/unknown mergeability, failing checks, broad deltas, or active waiting-on-author status.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR, but dirty merge state, failed checks, missing Codex /review proof, and waiting-on-author status block merge. Repairing the contributor branch is the appropriate non-mutating plan.
Scope is a small feature crossing gateway and UI surfaces with unknown mergeability and waiting-on-author status. Product/maintainer acceptance is required before repair or merge planning.

Useful contributor PR in the same agents/subagent family, but dirty merge state, failed proof check, review-bot comments without addressed proof, missing Codex /review, and waiting-on-author status require repair before any merge path.
The PR is too broad for an automated finalization recommendation in this shard. It needs maintainer judgment or a narrower follow-up split before repair or merge work.
Narrow useful contributor PR, but failing behavior proof, unknown mergeability, and missing Codex /review block merge. Repairing the contributor branch is a concrete next path.
Create a bounded repair artifact for the three narrow bug-fix PRs rather than replacing contributor work.

needs_human: #81391 requires maintainer/product judgment before proceeding because it is a gateway/UI feature with unknown mergeability, incomplete merge preflight, and waiting-on-author status.

#82023 requires maintainer judgment or a split plan because it is a broad Telegram/thread-binding feature delta with 33 files and +2030/-29 changes, unknown mergeability, incomplete merge preflight, and waiting-on-author status.
